## Description

A clear description of the feature you would like.

## Use Case

Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution

How you think this could be implemented.

## Impact on Safety Constraints

Does this feature affect any of the five safety invariants (C1--C5)?
If so, describe how constraint preservation will be maintained.

## Additional Context

Any other relevant information.
